report.summary: Community growth cycle v21: Drafted 4 social posts (CLARITY Act stablecoin breakdown, F&G recovery 4-part thread, new guides content drop, Tuesday market outlook), newsletter v16 for Thu Mar 27, Discord/TG evening update, and created 2 branded SVG social cards (CLARITY Act Regulatory Milestone + Fear & Greed Sentiment Recovery). Market: BTC $70,600 holding bounce, F&G recovered 11→33 (48-day extreme fear streak broken, fastest recovery since FTX), CLARITY Act stablecoin deal 99% done (Senate markup targeting late April), stablecoins $312B ATH, 486 total published pages with only 2 remaining in queue.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #75: CLARITY Act Stablecoin Breakthrough — 'The CLARITY Act stablecoin deal is 99% done.' Passive yield banned, activity rewards allowed, Senate markup late April, must pass by May. Link to crypto-regulations-2026 (Schedule Tue Mar 25 7PM)

Tweet #76: Fear & Greed Recovery Thread (4 parts) — F&G 11→33 in 4 days, 48-day streak broken, historical pattern +18% in 30 days, March close make-or-break, smart money signals (ETF inflows, MicroStrategy, CLARITY Act). Links to fear-greed-timeline + market-cycles-guide (Schedule Wed Mar 26 10AM)
Tweet #77: New Guides Content Drop — 4 new guides (On-Chain Analytics, Crypto Arbitrage, BitVM, Market Making) + Polymarket & Scroll queued. 486 pages published, 2 in queue (Schedule Thu Mar 27 12PM)
Tweet #78: Tuesday Market Outlook — BTC $70,600, F&G 33, stablecoins $312B ATH, ETH $2,140, key watches (CLARITY Act review, March close, MicroStrategy) (Schedule Tue Mar 25 12PM)

Newsletter v16 (for weekly digest Thu Mar 27): Subject 'Fear & Greed Jumped 22 Points in 4 Days. Here's What the Data Says.' — market pulse, 4 new guides, worth reading picks (Market Cycles, DeFi Liquidation Protection), degen corner on CLARITY Act stablecoin yield as most underrated story
Discord/TG evening update: market data (BTC $70,600, F&G 33, streak broken) + 4 new guides + Polymarket/Scroll queued
Content calendar v20 — 4 tweets + 1 newsletter + 1 Discord announcement scheduled Mar 25–29

sections.title: Social Visuals Created
items: SVG card: 'CLARITY Act: Stablecoin Deal 99% Done' — 1200x630, dark glass-morphism (#080d1c), green REGULATORY MILESTONE badge, key terms panel (passive yield banned with red X, activity rewards allowed with green check, timeline), 4 stat boxes (Stablecoin Supply $312B ATH / Deal Status 99% Done / F&G 11→33 / BTC $70,600), green-cyan accent scheme, degen0x.com branding

SVG card: 'Fear & Greed: 11 → 33 — 48-Day Streak Broken' — 1200x630, dark glass-morphism, amber SENTIMENT RECOVERY badge, interactive gauge visualization showing F&G scale with old position (11, Mar 20) and new position (33, Mar 24) with +22 delta, 3 key signal boxes (Spot ETF 6 Straight Days / Fear Streak 48 Days Broken / CLARITY Act 99% Done), stat boxes (BTC $70,600 / Stablecoins $312B ATH), degen0x.com branding

sections.title: Market Intelligence Used
items: BTC: $70,600 holding post-bounce. March close in 6 days — still up ~2% monthly, 7-month red streak avoidable but fragile.
ETH: $2,140 — lagging BTC. BTC dominance at 58.7% (elevated). ETH struggling to hold relative ground.
F&G: Recovered from 11 (Mar 20) to 33 (Mar 24). 48-day extreme fear streak officially broken. Now in 'Fear' zone. Fastest recovery since FTX collapse.

CLARITY Act: Stablecoin yield compromise reached — passive yield banned, activity rewards allowed. Deal 99% done. Senate Banking Committee markup targeting late April. Must advance by early May or dies this session.
Stablecoins: $312B+ supply ATH. Tether alone at $183B market cap (3rd largest crypto). Historical pattern: stablecoin ATH during fear = rally within 2-4 weeks.
Spot BTC ETFs: 6 consecutive days of inflows ($201M on Mar 16). Institutional accumulation continuing despite retail fear. MicroStrategy hinting at new purchase.
Iran-US: BTC swung $67,500→$71,200→$70,000 in one session on Trump/Iran strike headlines. Geopolitical volatility persists.
DeFi Security: $137M+ cumulative losses in 2026. Risk management content increasingly relevant.
SUI: Approaching critical breakout zone. 2x leveraged ETF on Nasdaq + Grayscale SUI Trust S-1. Strongest institutional L1 momentum outside BTC/ETH/SOL.
degen0x: 486 total published pages. 4 new guides published today (On-Chain Analytics, Arbitrage, BitVM, Market Making). Only 2 pages remaining in publish queue (Polymarket, Scroll).
